packs.name: daily-operator-rhythm
packs.label: Daily Operator Rhythm
packs.description: Turn on the core daily planning and reflection skills plus a reusable goal snapshot workflow.
packs.sample_prompt: Run a morning intention and save a goal snapshot for today.

packs.name: research-briefing
packs.label: Research Briefing
packs.description: Enable web research helpers and the note-saving workflow for repeatable briefs.
packs.sample_prompt: Search the web for the latest Warsaw weather and save a concise brief.

packs.name: weekly-alignment
packs.label: Weekly Alignment
packs.description: Enable weekly review and planning routines grounded in goals and soul context.
packs.sample_prompt: Reflect on my goals and prepare a weekly plan from the current priorities.
